metadata.study: NITI Aayog, National Multidimensional Poverty Index: A Progress Review 2023
metadata.method: Headcount ratio (share of population who are multidimensionally poor) by State/UT, NFHS-5 (2019-21), from the report's State/UT headcount-ratio chart. MPI is a composite of deprivation in health, education and living standards (nutrition, cooking fuel, housing, assets, electricity, sanitation, water).
